response.justification: Mohammed Al-Said is a capable senior full-stack engineer with roughly 17 years of broad software experience, but the gap between his profile and this Director-level AI strategy role is substantial. The role requires recognized AI expertise with demonstrated AI-powered products or platforms at scale, strategic customer advisory experience, and the ability to shape cloud product vision — none of which are evident in the resume. His AI involvement is limited to less than two months at re:cinq, there is no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and his career trajectory has been that of a hands-on implementer rather than a technical strategist or principal-level leader.
strengths: 17+ years of continuous software engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — meets the minimum tenure requirement
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq signals early movement toward the AI domain
Demonstrated entrepreneurial instinct through founding GISCollective, open-source library authorship, and knowledge-sharing via workshops and conference talks
concerns: AI experience is effectively nascent (<2 months) with no demonstrated AI-powered products or platforms at meaningful scale
No advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field, and no cloud architecture credentials or recognizable cloud platform expertise
Career history shows no strategic advisory, Director-level IC scope, or experience influencing product direction at an organizational or customer-facing level
